svg.title: Plotterbench test card 09 — ENDURANCE STRESS
svg.desc: Plotter QA diagnostic. Units = mm. Plot identically on every machine; grade by physical measurement.

g.text: USB/buffer stability · memory · long-run drift (1000+ short paths)
2000 separate strokes — run start to finish without stall/disconnect/drift
watch: buffer underruns, USB drops, memory growth, registration at the end vs start
